name: Russell Brand
blurb: He rose to fame in the mid-2000s hosting Big Brothers Big Mouth and presenting radio shows, then toured arena stand-up and appeared in Hollywood films including Forgetting Sarah Marshall.
bio: Russell Brand is an English comedian, actor and presenter known for flamboyant, verbose stand-up and a confessional style drawn from his past addiction. He rose to fame in the mid-2000s hosting Big Brothers Big Mouth and presenting radio shows, then toured arena stand-up and appeared in Hollywood films including Forgetting Sarah Marshall. In later years he shifted toward online political commentary, and from 2023 faced widely reported allegations of sexual assault, which he denies.

timeline.ev: Makes his first significant stand-up appearances
Hosts Big Brothers Big Mouth on Channel 4
Publishes the best-selling memoir My Booky Wook
Releases the stand-up special Scandalous and appears in Forgetting Sarah Marshall
Tours and releases the special Messiah Complex
Faces widely reported allegations of sexual assault, which he denies

accolades: Time Out Magazine Stand-Up Comedian of the Year (2006)
British Comedy Award for Best Newcomer (2006)
Best-selling author of My Booky Wook

bits.t: This Is What Becoming A Father Has Done To Me
